name: Bicentennial Park
description: Bicentennial Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Ticonderoga, NY. There are 4 outdoor asphalt courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts cannot be reserved. The courts are free.

name: Elizabethtown Social Center
description: Elizabethtown Social Center is a place to play pickleball in Elizabethtown, NY. There is 1 outdoor court. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The court is free.

name: Lake George Paddle and Pickleball
description: Lake George Paddle and Pickleball is a place to play pickleball in Ticonderoga, NY. There are 2 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A one-time fee is required to play. Amenities include restrooms.

name: lewis Central School
description: lewis Central School is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Elizabethtown, NY. There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are private.

name: Moriah Pickleball Courts
description:
We have for your convenience a happy place to whack your pickles. Includes a private restroom that you need the combination for the lock to use as well as the watchful eyes of the pickle master himself. George it that is his real name Kees constant supervision of all portable restroom and pickle pounding activity.
The neighbors seem very friendly and happy to hear the constant screams of joy from all the dinking and donking

name: Schroon Lake Town Tennis Courts
description: Come play pickleball at Schroon Lake Town Tennis Courts in Schroon Lake, NY! There are 2 outdoor hard courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are free.

name: Willsboro Pickleball Indoor Court
description:
Open from 7:00am to 11:00pm, 7 days a week.  Text for a reservation.

• One-of-a-kind indoor, pro-cushion court surface

• Private play; your time slot is your personal space

• Play year-round; no hot sun, wind, gritty surface or bugs

• Paddles and balls provided

• AC or Heat, Bathroom, 6 cushioned Adirondack chairs
open_play_schedule: Text Rebecca Palmer, owner, directly at 518-572-6893 for a private court time or to set you up to play with others. You do not have to be a member, but you do have to text Rebecca to reserve an available court time. Members have first scheduling choice.
fees: Members only — Text Rebecca Palmer, owner, directly at 518-572-6893 for a private court time or to set you up to play with others
